doc_title_en: Notice of Completion of Acquisition of Treasury Stock and Termination of Acquisition by Off-Exchange Transaction (ToSTNeT-3)

key_facts.reason_jp: 資本効率改善による企業価値向上

summary_en: NAC completed acquisition of 1,455,000 shares (3.46% of outstanding) for ¥744.96M via ToSTNeT-3, improving capital efficiency and enabling strategic uses including M&A, restricted stock awards, and potential cancellation.
summary_jp: ナックが1,455,000株（発行済みの3.46%）を¥744.96Mで取得完了。資本効率改善とM&A・RS制度・自己株式消却に活用予定。
tag_jp: 自己株式取得 · 1,455,000株 · ¥744.96M · ToSTNeT-3 · 取得終了

doc_title_en: Notice of Acquisition of Treasury Shares and Purchase via Off-Hours ToSTNeT-3 Trading

key_facts.reason_jp: 資本効率改善による企業価値向上

summary_en: 300,000 shares (3.07% of issued S/O excl. treasury) to be acquired for max ¥600M via ToSTNeT-3 on 5 May 2025 before 08:00 JST. Capital efficiency and enterprise value improvement.
summary_jp: 300,000株（発行済株式総数3.07%）を最大¥600Mで5月5日午前8時前にToSTNeT-3で取得。資本効率改善を目指す。
tag_jp: 自己株式取得 - 300,000株 (3.07% S/O) - ¥600M - ToSTNeT-3
